tactician.name: Tactician
tactician.description: Your strategic mind allows precise positioning of allies before battle. Enables manual deployment of party members.

battle_hardened.name: Battle Hardened
battle_hardened.description: Years of combat have toughened your body. +10% max HP.

quick_reflexes.name: Quick Reflexes
quick_reflexes.description: Your reactions are lightning fast. +5 Initiative.

arcane_reservoir.name: Arcane Reservoir
arcane_reservoir.description: Your magical capacity has expanded. +15% max Mana.

eagle_eye.name: Eagle Eye
eagle_eye.description: Your keen sight extends your effective range. +1 Range for ranged attacks.

nimble_fighter.name: Nimble Fighter
nimble_fighter.description: You dance around your enemies with ease. +5 Dodge.

spell_focus.name: Spell Focus
spell_focus.description: Your concentration amplifies your magic. +3 Spellpower.

iron_will.name: Iron Will
iron_will.description: Your mind is a fortress. +10% resistance to all magical damage.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Once per combat, recover 25% HP when reduced below 25% HP.

ambush_master.name: Ambush Master
ambush_master.description: Strike first, strike hard. +50% damage on first attack in combat.

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.description: Upgrades that affect the whole party
